# Valepath

## About
Valepath provides structured technology due diligence for PE-backed transactions. Every engagement follows a standardised 8-dimension framework producing peer-benchmarked risk scores, phased cost-to-fix estimates (GBP, 0–3 / 3–12 / 12–24 months), a first 100 days operational plan, and deal-structuring implications designed to be lifted directly into an IC memo. Delivered in 10–15 working days. Founded by Pedro Rivera Torres Moir. London-focused.

## The 8-Dimension Framework
1. Architecture & Infrastructure — cloud maturity, technical debt, scalability, SPOFs
2. Team & Organisation — composition, key-person risk, hiring feasibility, culture
3. Security & Compliance — OWASP, SOC 2, GDPR/NIS2, incident history, IAM
4. Data & Analytics — quality, governance, integration, privacy
5. AI & Proprietary Technology — models, IP portfolio, training-data governance, EU AI Act exposure, moat durability
6. Cost Structure — spend analysis, optimisation, benchmarking, cost-to-fix
7. Delivery Capability — DORA metrics, AI engineering leverage, backlog, practices
8. Strategic Alignment & Bolt-on Readiness — roadmap fit, multi-tenancy, integration readiness, exit attractiveness

## Pages
- / — Landing page: 8-dimension framework, deliverables, track record, about, contact
- /sample-dd-report.pdf — Illustrative sample DD report (fictional LegalTech target)

## Deliverables per engagement
- Executive summary (2 pages, IC-ready)
- First 100 days operational plan (detachable, standalone for deal team)
- 8 dimension assessments with peer-benchmarked 1–5 scoring
- Risk scorecard (composite vs peer median)
- Cost-to-fix estimate (phased, GBP)
- Deal structuring implications (price adjustment, escrow milestones, reps & warranties, earnout, retention)

## Target clients
UK and European mid-market private equity firms. Portfolio company revenue range $30M–$400M. Deals where technology is a material factor in the investment thesis.
